guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle:
New to TerminalNexus?
Get started in 4 simple steps.
guide.step1_desc: Click 'Sign Up' in the top right and register with your email or social account in just 30 seconds.
guide.step2_desc: After logging in, click 'Create Terminal' on the dashboard and your personal Linux environment will be ready instantly.
guide.step3_desc: Install TN CLI and use 'tn login → tn ssh' to control your remote workspace directly from your local machine.
guide.step4_desc: Connect with developers on the Free Board and manage your profile and plan anytime in My Page.
guide.faq1_q: What can I do with the free plan?
guide.faq1_a: The free plan gives you full access to the Linux terminal environment, TN CLI, and community board with no restrictions.
guide.faq2_a: Your work data is permanently preserved even after a session ends. You can continue exactly where you left off when you reconnect.
guide.faq3_a: Yes, you can sign in quickly with your Google or GitHub account.
guide.contact_desc: For a quick response, reach out to us via email.
